description: Set parameters for a fluid flow analysis. This command is only available model configure fluid has been specified. The activity can be directly specified by providing b . See the ref:-Fluid-Mechanical Interaction <fluid-mechanical>- section for complete information. :flag3:[cs: commmon]`

keywords.name: active
keywords.description: The fluid process is on , by default, when the model configure fluid command is given. Specify active off to suppress fluid calculations.

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: f is the accumulated fluid time for the model. This can be reset to any value, and will continue to be accumulated during cycling after that.

keywords.name: slave
keywords.description: Specify that fluid mode is to be considered a slave, and cycled to equilibrium after each master step has been taken.

keywords.name: substep
keywords.description: Specify the maximum number of steps the fluid process will take when solving with slave on .

keywords.name: safety-factor
keywords.description: The stable timestep is calculated automatically. This is the default setting. Set the timestep to be the fixed value f . All timestep calculations are skipped. Setting a value greater than the calculated critical timestep will result in an error. Set the incremental amount that the timestep is allowed to increase from one cycle to the next in auto mode. By default, f = 1.05. The timestep can decrease by any amount to ensure stability. Set the maximum allowed timestep. By default, there is no bound to the maximum timestep. Set the timestep safety factor, or the factor that is multiplied by the stable timestep calculated when auto mode. By default, f = 1.0.

keywords.name: active
keywords.description: The fluid process is on , by default, when the model configure fluid command is given. Specify active off to suppress fluid calculations.

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: f is the accumulated fluid time for the model. This can be reset to any value, and will continue to be accumulated during cycling after that.

keywords.name: slave
keywords.description: Specify that fluid mode is to be considered a slave, and cycled to equilibrium after each master step has been taken.

keywords.name: substep
keywords.description: Specify the maximum number of steps the fluid process will take when solving with slave on .

keywords.name: timestep
keywords.description: Configure timestep behavior for the fluid process. Sub-keywords: automatic (default; stable timestep is recalculated automatically), fix <f> (use fixed timestep <f>; calculation skipped), increment <f> (maximum per-cycle increase factor when in automatic mode; default 1.05), maximum <f> (upper bound on timestep; unbounded by default), safety-factor <f> (multiplier on the calculated stable timestep in automatic mode; default 1.0), update <i> (recompute timestep every <i> cycles; default 1).

keywords.description: The fluid process is on , by default, when the model configure fluid command is given. Specify active off to suppress fluid calculations.

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: f is the accumulated fluid time for the model. This can be reset to any value, and will continue to be accumulated during cycling after that.

keywords.name: follower
keywords.description: Specify that fluid mode is to be considered a follower, and cycled to equilibrium after each leader step has been taken.

keywords.name: substep
keywords.description: Specify the maximum number of steps the fluid process will take when solving with follower on .

keywords.name: timestep
keywords.description: Configure timestep behavior for the fluid process. Sub-keywords: automatic (default; stable timestep is recalculated automatically), fix <f> (use fixed timestep <f>; calculation skipped), increment <f> (maximum per-cycle increase factor when in automatic mode; default 1.05), maximum <f> (upper bound on timestep; unbounded by default), safety-factor <f> (multiplier on the calculated stable timestep in automatic mode; default 1.0), update <i> (recompute timestep every <i> cycles; default 1).
